name: Xavier
description:
“Linkon City isn’t your hunting ground. Your kind don’t belong here.” | In which Xavier meets a freshly-turned vampire.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

It’s been months since Lumiere, the famous vampire slayer, has patrolled the streets. But when a dozen of men and women suddenly go missing within the span of weeks, Xavier knows he has to put an end to it. He just isn’t expecting himself to find one of the missing women, freshly turned, abandoned by the one who turned her.
